entries.note: The production schema contains the migration's onboarding columns, but the production migration ledger has no matching entry. Verify the original application evidence before any repair operation.
Production application version differs from the repository filename. Preserve both records; do not rename the local migration.
Production application version differs from the repository filename. Preserve both records; do not rename the local migration.
Additive, NOT VALID eligibility constraint; isolated migration execution remains required.
Additive source links and backfills for ADRs 0001-0003; isolated execution and row verification are required before cutover.
Moves is_admin outside the exposed schema, normalizes policy auth initplans, consolidates proven duplicates, and adds query-justified indexes. Isolated RLS/grant validation is required.
Adds CIMD client binding, token validity/revocation fields, assertion replay protection, and bounded service-role cleanup. Isolated OAuth/RLS validation is required.
Adds a service-only hashed replay ledger and bounded cleanup for public MCP create/log/composite tools. Isolated replay/concurrency/RLS validation is required.
Adds resumable onboarding stages and safely retains legacy user-authored functional notes in the canonical constraints model. Isolated backfill and RLS validation are required.

Adds service-only deletion jobs, legal holds, account access state, claim/retry mechanics, and dry-run retention cleanup. Destructive execution remains feature-flag gated and requires isolated validation plus owner review.
Registers the material English legal-document versions without modifying prior consent evidence. Professional legal review is still required.

Adds an empty owner-gated offering catalog, service-only provider records and event ledger, and user-readable provider-neutral entitlements. It seeds no price or paid capability and requires isolated RLS/webhook validation.

Adds database-owned release compatibility, atomic OAuth code consumption, leased MCP idempotency recovery, stale deletion recovery, and durable billing claims. Isolated migration, concurrency, reconciliation, and RLS validation are mandatory.

Overrides the MCP idempotency claim function so expired pending work requires review instead of unsafe automatic re-execution; updates schema marker evidence. Isolated concurrency validation is mandatory.

Adds the seven-section adaptive onboarding schema, canonical nutrition and constraint fields, and an authenticated atomic completion RPC. Apply only after earlier pending onboarding and canonical constraint migrations, then verify RLS, draft resume, and completion behavior.
